description: Discussion on the recent updates and issues related to the Solana validator community, including the rollout of the nonce feature and updates on the QWIK protocol.
topic_summary: The call covers the activation of the nonce feature [t=0:00], the rollout of version 1.10.26 addressing liveness issues [t=35:33], and upcoming updates for testnet [t=61:02]. Stephen Akridge discusses QWIK updates, performance optimizations, and benefits of the new protocol [t=149:08].
